global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple gradient background with engaging text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a streaming service with new hits every week.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text at the top reads 'BingeLayer', set against the purple background.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: White text in the center states 'Stream the hype', emphasizing the streaming service.

elements.label: Additional info text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the subheadline reads 'New hits every week', providing more context.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button at the bottom with the text 'Install now', inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: Various abstract shapes in lighter shades of purple are scattered throughout the ad, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Decorative circles
elements.description: Two circular shapes in lighter purple tones are positioned near the center, enhancing the design.

elements.label: Decorative rectangle
elements.description: A rectangular shape in a lighter shade of purple is placed centrally, contributing to the overall layout.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: A smaller rectangle in a lighter shade of purple is positioned near the center, adding depth.

elements.label: Another decorative shape
elements.description: A slightly larger rectangle in a lighter shade of purple is placed centrally, complementing the other elements.

elements.label: Lower decorative element
elements.description: A decorative element at the bottom of the ad, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Lower decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned at the bottom, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Lower decorative element
elements.description: A small circular decorative element at the bottom, adding to the design.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Stream the hype New hits every week' is prominently displayed in white, conveying the main message.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype New hits every week

elements.label: Install button text
elements.description: The text 'Install now' is displayed on a button at the bottom, encouraging user action.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: The logo 'BingeLayer' is displayed at the top, representing the brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, vibrant and modern, promoting streaming service.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: BingeLayer, Stream the hype, New hits every week, Install now
